title: Analysts Agree Now's The Time To Buy These 10 Promising Stocks
text: Finding S&P 500 stocks that analysts agree on is rare. So when you see nearly unanimous agreement on some, that's quite a statement.

title: Midstream Energy Stocks Ranked By Quality
text: Given the current uncertainty, I believe high-quality, favorably valued, and low-risk investments warrant increased attention. Some midstream energy companies boast durable revenue, profitability, and well-supported high dividend yields.

title: Why Is Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) Down 12.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Midstream Caught In Middle Of Permian Producer Split
text: Public and private producers are parting ways in the Permian Basin. Led by Exxon Mobil, public companies have been steadily adding rigs in.

title: The 5 Best- and Worst-Performing Energy Stocks in February 2023
text: The energy sector had a stellar 2022, but it has been largely sitting out the recent broader market rally.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy That Analysts Are Loving Now
text: With a banking sector implosion compounding the Federal Reserve's possible decision to aggressively raise interest rates, investors looking for stocks to buy may want to align their acquisitive strategies with what the experts believe. In other words, a significant value may exist in targeting securities that enjoy strong buy consensus ratings among Wall Street analysts.

title: Energy Income Weekly: Guiding For Growth In 2023
text: Energy income equities were largely flat in an ugly week for the stock market. Fourth-quarter earnings results and forward guidance continue to come in strong.

title: Targa's (TRGP) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Miss
text: Targa Resources' (TRGP) 2023 adjusted EBITDA stands at $2.95-$3.5 billion, growth capex at $1.8-$1.9 billion, and net maintenance capex at $175 million.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy to Retire Rich
text: If you're looking for dividend stocks to buy to retire rich, I can help you.  However, it's important to remember that dividend stocks alone aren't the cure-all for retiring rich.
